about_item: SUPER SEEDS FOR HEALTH: Flax seed is the seed from the flax, an annual herb which is a member of the Linaceae family. Flax seed has been the focus of interest in the field of diet and health due to the potential health benefits associated with some of its biologically active components. AS-IT-IS flax seeds are organic, one of the best functional foods especially suitable for those allergic to soy, nuts and gluten. Flax seeds possess a crispy texture and nutty taste. | VEGAN SOURCE OF OMEGA: Flax seeds’ primary health reputation owes to its rich source of Omega-3 fatty acids. Flax seeds are rich in alpha-linolenic acid (ALA), which is a type of omega-3 fatty acid that is plant-based. Omega-3 fatty acids are essential fatty acids that your body needs to function optimally but cannot produce on its own. As per research, the use of flax in the diet is showing more promise in many health conditions. | ANTIOXIDANT RICH: Oxidative stress and inflammation often occurs due to free radical damage and is often linked to insufficient intake of antioxidant nutrients. Oxidative stress is a common risk factor for a wide variety of health problems. Regular intake of flax seeds, one of the best sources of vegan omega-3 fatty acids and rich source of micronutrients, decreases the risk of your oxidative damage and inflammation by providing greater antioxidant protection. | BOOSTS IMMUNITY: Maintaining a healthy and balanced diet allows you to stay healthy, and a healthy body is the best way of fighting harmful viruses and bacteria. Flax seeds contain alpha-linolenic acids (essential omega-3 fatty acids), and lignans that favourably affect the immune system. The omega’s regulate the body’s ability to defend itself successfully against foreign substances through its effects on membrane phospholipids and the production of eicosanoids and cytokines. | MAY PROMOTE WEIGHT LOSS: Flax seeds are gluten-free with the low glycemic index making it a great choice for those wanting to manage or lose weight. Because of its high fibre content, flax seeds help slow the digestion, make you feel fuller, keep hunger at bay and result in lower intake of calories on a daily basis. If you tend to snack in between meals and you want to lower your food consumption, then flax seeds are great for controlling your appetite.
